name: NetShield Firewall Analyzer
shortInfo: Automated network traffic analysis and threat detection tool
description: A comprehensive network security tool that captures and analyzes traffic in real-time, identifies potential threats using signature-based detection, and generates detailed security reports. Built with Python and integrated with Suricata IDS rules.

name: VaultCrypt Password Manager
shortInfo: Zero-knowledge encrypted password vault with CLI interface
description: A zero-knowledge password manager built from scratch using AES-256-GCM encryption. Features include master password derivation via Argon2, secure clipboard integration, TOTP generation, and encrypted cloud sync. No plaintext ever leaves the device.

name: WebRecon OSINT Framework
shortInfo: Open-source intelligence gathering toolkit for web targets
description: An automated OSINT framework for gathering intelligence on web targets. Performs subdomain enumeration, technology fingerprinting, email harvesting, social media correlation, and generates comprehensive reconnaissance reports in PDF format.
